prompt: Tap the big blind seat in the action-order ring.
why_v1: Big blind context changes call and fold thresholds.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. Big blind context is locked.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. The big blind closes the blind pair, so anchor it first. That seat acts after the small blind preflop and faces the cleanest defend-or-fold decision once the open reaches it.
